description:
OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#716-762) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- averageDiff = (initialDiff + nextDiff) / 2 (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#755)
	- taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#760)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L716-L762) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [averageDiff = (initialDiff + nextDiff) / 2](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L755)
	- [taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L760)

description:
TokenPrices.glpPrice(IGlpManager) (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#103-115) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- avgAum = (aums[0] + aums[1]) / 2 (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#106)
	- scaleToPrecision(avgAum * 1e18 / glpSupply,30) (contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#111)
markdown:
[TokenPrices.glpPrice(IGlpManager)](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L103-L115) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [avgAum = (aums[0] + aums[1]) / 2](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L106)
	- [scaleToPrecision(avgAum * 1e18 / glpSupply,30)](contracts/common/TokenPrices.sol#L111)

description:
OrigamiGmxManager.buyUsdgQuote(uint256,address) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#672-693) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- amountAfterFees = fromAmount * (basisPointsDivisor - feeBasisPoints) / basisPointsDivisor (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#691)
	- usdgAmountOut = gmxVault.adjustForDecimals(amountAfterFees * price / pricePrecision,fromToken,usdg) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#692)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.buyUsdgQuote(uint256,address)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L672-L693) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [amountAfterFees = fromAmount * (basisPointsDivisor - feeBasisPoints) / basisPointsDivisor](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L691)
	- [usdgAmountOut = gmxVault.adjustForDecimals(amountAfterFees * price / pricePrecision,fromToken,usdg)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L692)

description:
OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool) (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#716-762) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- averageDiff = targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#757)
	- taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#760)
	- targetAmount = gmxVault.tokenWeights(_token) * usdgSupply / gmxVault.totalTokenWeights() (contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#741-743)
markdown:
[OrigamiGmxManager.getFeeBasisPoints(address,uint256,bool)](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L716-L762) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [averageDiff = targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L757)
	- [taxBps = taxBasisPoints * averageDiff / targetAmount](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L760)
	- [targetAmount = gmxVault.tokenWeights(_token) * usdgSupply / gmxVault.totalTokenWeights()](contracts/investments/gmx/OrigamiGmxManager.sol#L741-L743)

description:
Reentrancy in OrigamiInvestmentVault.exitToToken(IOrigamiInvestment.ExitQuoteData,uint256,address) (contracts/investments/OrigamiInvestmentVault.sol#292-331):
	External calls:
	- IERC20(reserveToken).safeTransfer(msg.sender,toTokenAmount) (contracts/investments/OrigamiInvestmentVault.sol#309)
	- toTokenAmount = IOrigamiInvestment(reserveToken).exitToToken(underlyingQuoteData.underlyingExitQuoteData,slippageBps,recipient) (contracts/investments/OrigamiInvestmentVault.sol#324-328)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Exited(msg.sender,quoteData.investmentTokenAmount,quoteData.toToken,toTokenAmount,recipient) (contracts/investments/OrigamiInvestmentVault.sol#330)
markdown:
Reentrancy in [OrigamiInvestmentVault.exitToToken(IOrigamiInvestment.ExitQuoteData,uint256,address)](contracts/investments/OrigamiInvestmentVault.sol#L292-L331):
	External calls:
	- [IERC20(reserveToken).safeTransfer(msg.sender,toTokenAmount)](contracts/investments/OrigamiInvestmentVault.sol#L309)
	- [toTokenAmount = IOrigamiInvestment(reserveToken).exitToToken(underlyingQuoteData.underlyingExitQuoteData,slippageBps,recipient)](contracts/investments/OrigamiInvestmentVault.sol#L324-L328)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Exited(msg.sender,quoteData.investmentTokenAmount,quoteData.toToken,toTokenAmount,recipient)](contracts/investments/OrigamiInvestmentVault.sol#L330)
